title: Eulalia lagopus
taxonomy: Eulalia lagopus is classified as a species of grass, belonging to the genus Eulalia in the family Poaceae. The Poaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as grasses. Eulalia lagopus is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Its classification also places it within the order Poales, a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as monocots. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships with other grasses.
